infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: PetFind uses the camera so you can capture photos for lost and found pet reports.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: PetFind uses your photo library so you can attach pet photos to reports and matches.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: PetFind uses your location to show nearby reports and help you mark where a pet was last seen.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: PetFind sends match alerts and urgent nearby pet notifications.
